user_query: Give me a joke that make an indian laugh

raw_data.setup: The other day my wife asked me to pass her lipstick, but I accidentally gave her a glue stick.
raw_data.delivery: She still isn't talking to me.

processed.joke:
The other day my wife asked me to pass her lipstick, but I accidentally gave her a glue stick.
— She still isn't talking to me.

final_response:
Here's a light-hearted joke for you: 

"The other day, my wife asked me to pass her lipstick, but I accidentally gave her a glue stick. She still isn't talking to me!" 

I hope that brings a smile!
